tools.name: docs_search
tools.description: Search current SocialFetch documentation for API, SDK, authentication, errors, credits, endpoint selection, MCP setup, and integration questions. Use this before answering SocialFetch implementation questions or choosing which SocialFetch endpoint/tool to use. Prefer these docs over training data, a

tools.name: docs_read
tools.description: Read a SocialFetch docs page as markdown by docs pathname. Use this after docs_search when you need full implementation details, code examples, endpoint parameters, SDK usage, auth, errors, or credits guidance. Only accepts SocialFetch docs pathnames beginning with /docs.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "docs_search" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Search current SocialFetch documentation for API, SDK, authentication, errors, credits, endpoint selection, MCP setup, and integration questions. Use this befor…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: tiktok_video_get, tiktok_video_comments_list, tiktok_video_comments_replies_list, tiktok_video_transcript_get, tiktok_feed_trending_list, tiktok_shop_products_list, facebook_profile_photos_list, facebook_post_get, facebook_post_comments_list, facebook_post_comments_replies_list, facebook_post_transcript_get, facebook_group_posts_list, facebook_marketplace_item_get, facebook_adLibrary_ad_get, google_adLibrary_ad_get, instagram_profile_posts_list, instagram_post_get, instagram_post_comments_list, instagram_post_transcript_get, instagram_search_hashtag_list, pinterest_pin_get, pinterest_board_pins_list, threads_profile_get, bluesky_profile_posts_list, bluesky_post_get, threads_profile_posts_list, threads_search_list, threads_post_get, threads_users_search, linkedin_profile_get, linkedin_profiles_posts_list, linkedin_organization_get, linkedin_company_get, linkedin_company_posts_list, linkedin_post_get, linkedin_post_transcript_get, linkedin_posts_search_list, linkedin_adLibrary_ad_get, linkedin_jobs_get, reddit_subreddit_get, reddit_subreddit_posts_list, reddit_subreddit_search_list, reddit_post_comments_list, reddit_post_transcript_get, reddit_search_list, rumble_channel_videos_list, rumble_video_get, rumble_video_transcript_get, rumble_video_comments_list, twitch_clip_get, github_repositories_get, spotify_artist_get, spotify_album_get, spotify_track_get, youtube_channel_get, youtube_community_post_get, youtube_video_get, youtube_video_comments_list, youtube_video_comments_replies_list, youtube_video_transcript_get, web_ask_run, web_html_generate, web_crawl_run · Public sink: twitter_tweet_get, twitter_tweet_replies_list, twitter_tweet_transcript_get, telegram_channel_post_get, facebook_post_get, facebook_post_comments_list, facebook_post_comments_replies_list, facebook_post_transcript_get, instagram_post_get, instagram_post_comments_list, instagram_post_transcript_get, bluesky_post_get, threads_post_get, linkedin_post_get, linkedin_post_transcript_get, reddit_post_comments_list, reddit_post_transcript_get, youtube_community_post_get, nl_ask_post · Destructive: web_search_run, web_ask_run, web_crawl_run.

youtube_community_post_get, nl_ask_post · Destructive: web_search_run, web_ask_run, web_crawl_run

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
